overrides.override_summary: Provision restricting venue to forum outside California is void for claims arising under or relating to franchise agreement involving CA franchise business (CA Franchise Relations Act §20040.5)
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee can litigate in California, not just Florida

overrides.override_summary: General release requirement modified per CA Corporations Code §31512
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may have broader release protections

overrides.override_summary: CA law applies to franchise agreements involving CA franchise businesses despite FL choice of law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise law protections override FL law provisions

overrides.override_summary: Maximum interest rate for late payments capped at 10% annually
Liquidated damages clause in Development Agreement may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: May limit BKC's ability to recover certain damages

overrides.override_summary: Cannot prohibit franchisee from joining association of franchisees
Cannot terminate prior to expiration except for good cause with 30-day cure opportunity
Cannot refuse to renew without fair market value compensation for inventory/equipment/fixtures (if term <5 years and no continued use allowed)
Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause (transferee qualifications, competitor, unwillingness to comply, default)
Cannot require release/assignment/novation/waiver depriving franchisee of statutory rights (post-execution settlement permitted)
MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law provides additional termination protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Enhanced cure periods and good cause requirements

overrides.override_summary: General release requirements modified per MD franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: May not require release of MD statutory claims

overrides.override_summary: Venue restrictions modified per MD law
ND franchise law provides in-state venue rights
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot force ND franchisee to litigate in FL

overrides.override_summary: Covenants not to compete may be unenforceable under ND law
overrides.why_it_matters: Post-term non-compete may not be enforced

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs franchise relationships in ND
General release waiver limited per ND Century Code
ND statute of limitations applies; references to limitation of claims deleted
Jury trial waiver provisions may be unenforceable
HI franchise law may void out-of-state venue requirements
HI law may apply to HI franchise relationships
IL Franchise Disclosure Act may void out-of-state venue
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisees can sue in IL

overrides.override_summary: IL law governs IL franchise relationships
WA Franchise Investment Protection Act provides in-state venue rights
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot force WA franchisee to FL

overrides.override_summary: Release provisions modified per WA law
WA provides additional termination protections
MN Franchise Act provides additional termination protections and cure periods
Limitations on general release requirements
RI may void out-of-state venue requirements
VA Retail Franchising Act may limit venue restrictions
WI Fair Dealership Law provides additional termination protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot terminate without good cause and 90-day cure

overrides.override_summary: Must provide 90 days' written notice
